task: Phase 06 — DB Settings & Delivery (runtime connection-string settings page + customer delivery package)
why: ADMIN-only settings page rewrites .env DATABASE_URL (holds the SQL Server password) and restarts the app; a bad write could lock out auth or clobber AUTH_SECRET. Injection-safe env-write, save-gate ordering, sanitized errors, and ADMIN gating are the trust-boundary controls. Delivery ships secret-bearing scripts + a Thai guide to the customer's DBA/IT.
